name: fetchfreeze
description: Deterministic HTTP fixture freezer for local-first CLI tests.

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js check examples/fixtures --max-age 9999d --offline-ok && node dist/src/cli.js map examples/fixtures --pretty
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm run check && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
